name: Ubiquiti airMAX 5 GHz, 20 dBi Sector
title: Ubiquiti airMAX 5 GHz, 20 dBi Sector
title_extended: Ubiquiti airMAX 5 GHz 20 dBi Sector Antenna AM-5G20-90 for PtMP Networks
description: The Sector AirMax 5G20-90 is a sector antenna meticulously engineered by Ubiquiti Networks to address the evolving demands of high-speed wireless networking. Designed for the 5 GHz frequency band, this model is a standout component of Ubiquiti's acclaimed AirMax series, renowned for delivering exceptional wireless broadband connectivity with a focus on performance, reliability, and coverage efficiency.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration with Ubiquiti airMAX Technology
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti Networks has designed the AM-5G20-90 for seamless integration with its Rocket M and Rocket Prism series of base stations that operate in the 5 GHz frequency band. When paired, for example, with a compatible Rocket Prism 5AC unit, the antenna becomes part of a powerful PtMP network solution capable of delivering high-speed internet access across expansive areas. This integration is facilitated by Ubiquiti’s airMAX technology, which employs intelligent QoS and TDMA protocols to significantly improve network throughput, reduce latency, and support a high density of users. AirMAX technology is a cornerstone of Ubiquiti's approach to wireless networking, enabling the AM-5G20-90 to deliver exceptional performance in a wide range of applications.

detailed_description.heading: High-Gain 20 dBi Performance
detailed_description.text: Characterized by a 20 dBi gain, the AM-5G20-90 antenna significantly amplifies signal strength, facilitating extended wireless coverage across larger distances. This high gain is instrumental in enhancing network reach and reliability, allowing network operators to efficiently cover vast areas without necessitating an excessive number of base stations. Such capability is vital for optimizing network deployment costs while ensuring robust connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Focused 90-Degree Beamwidth
detailed_description.text: The antenna features a 90-degree beamwidth, providing focused sector coverage ideal for point-to-multipoint (PtMP) configurations. This targeted coverage allows for effective communication with multiple client devices within the sector, ensuring high-quality connectivity even in environments with numerous potential interference sources. By concentrating the signal in a specific direction, the AM-5G20-90 maximizes network performance and capacity, making it an excellent choice for ISPs and network operators seeking broad yet precise wireless coverage.

detailed_description.heading: Dual-Polarization & Robust Outdoor Design
detailed_description.text: Incorporating dual-polarization technology, the AM-5G20-90 supports simultaneous transmission and reception of signals in both vertical and horizontal orientations. This dual-polarization not only doubles the potential data throughput but also significantly reduces interference, resulting in a more stable and reliable network connection. Constructed to withstand the rigors of outdoor deployment, the antenna boasts a robust, weather-resistant design for long-term reliability and sustained performance in diverse environmental conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Applications
detailed_description.text: Ideal for a wide array of applications, from extending broadband access to rural communities and enhancing connectivity across educational or corporate campuses, to providing reliable wireless service at public events or within large-scale surveillance networks. Its 90-degree beamwidth and 20 dBi gain make it an ideal choice for creating point-to-multipoint (PtMP) networks, serving as a central communication hub connecting multiple client devices spread out over large areas.
